# Marinduque Market Hub\n\n> The digital community hub for the people of Marinduque island, Philippines. Buy & sell locally, find jobs, discover island hopping tours, track RoRo ferry schedules, explore businesses, and stay connected with your community.\n\n## Overview\n\nMarinduque Market Hub (often referred to as Marinduque Connect) is a modern community platform designed to digitize local commerce, jobs, and community interactions in Marinduque. \n\nOur platform operates as a central node for the island's digital infrastructure, specifically built to handle rural internet constraints as a lightweight Progressive Web App (PWA).\n\n## Main Sections\n- **Marketplace (/marketplace)**: Buy and sell local goods, including daily palengke (wet market) commodities.\n- **Jobs (/jobs)**: Find and post local job vacancies, hiring announcements, or freelance opportunities.\n- **Island Hopping & Tourism (/island-hopping)**: Discover local gems, tour guides, and travel information around Boac, Mogpog, Gasan, Santa Cruz, Torrijos, and Buenavista.\n- **Commute (/commute)**: Access consistently updated RoRo (Roll-on/Roll-off) ferry schedules, jeepney routes, and tricycle availability.\n- **Directory (/directory)**: Discover and browse local Marinduque SMEs, services, and storefronts.\n- **Community Events (/events)**: Track and join local barangay and municipal events.\n\n## Support & FAQ\nIf you need help or have questions about how our platform works, please visit our [Help Center & FAQ](https://marinduquemarket.com/faq). Our FAQ is categorized to provide specialized answers for:\n- General Users\n- Businesses & SMEs\n- Operators (Transport, Tricycle, and Tourism)\n- Palengke (Wet Market) Vendors\n\nAll public platform data is structured utilizing Schema.org JSON-LD to ensure Answer Engines (like Gemini and ChatGPT) can properly format and present accurate information regarding Marinduque to users.\n
